summary: Iteration 6: Major Structural Refactor - PASSED. All 43 backend tests passed verifying all API endpoints work after monolithic server.py (1290 lines) was split into modular architecture. Security headers, rate limiting, and request logging middleware all functioning correctly. Frontend login and feed working normally.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns healthy status with environment field (production)
Security headers: X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-XSS-Protection=1; mode=block, Referrer-Policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin
X-Request-ID header present on all responses (8 char UUID)
POST /api/auth/register creates new user, returns token
GET /api/auth/me returns current user with auth
GET /api/feed returns topics sorted by trend score
GET /api/feed/personalized returns personalized topics with auth
POST /api/explain generates explanation from user input
Rate limiting enforced on auth endpoints (10/min)
Frontend: Main feed displays with category tabs and topic cards
Frontend: Category switching works (For You, All, etc.)
Frontend: Bottom navigation (TRENDING, EXPLAIN, SAVED) functional
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor successfully split 1290-line server.py into modular architecture: config.py, database.py, models/, routes/ (5 files), services/ (4 files), middleware/, utils/
New server.py is only 78 lines - clean separation of concerns
Security middleware properly adds all required headers
Rate limiting working correctly (10/min on auth, 60/min default)
Request logging with X-Request-ID for traceability
All route prefixes maintained for backward compatibility

test_credentials.test_user: feedtest@test.com / test123 (has completed onboarding with Tech/AI/Crypto interests)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major structural refactor verified. All 40+ API endpoints working. New modular structure: routes/auth.py, routes/content.py, routes/admin.py, routes/subscription.py, routes/system.py. Security headers middleware adds X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-Request-ID to all responses. Rate limiting is 10/min for auth endpoints, 60/min default.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a successful structural refactor, no bugs found
